assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know the AddBffExtensions() method on YARP builder

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'LoadFromMemory' with RouteConfig and ClusterConfig
assertions.rationale: LoadFromMemory is standard YARP configuration knowledge

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains '.WithAccessToken(TokenType.User)' on the RouteConfig (YARP uses TokenType, not RequiredTokenType)
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would not know the distinction between TokenType and RequiredTokenType for YARP
Without skill, an LLM would not know the WithAntiforgeryCheck extension on RouteConfig

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'MapReverseProxy' with a pipeline that calls 'UseAntiforgeryCheck()'
assertions.rationale: MapReverseProxy with pipeline is standard YARP; UseAntiforgeryCheck might be guessed
